title: Fix YouTube video embedding in BNHS Hymn section

requirements.summary: Fix YouTube video embedding functionality to convert standard and short YouTube URLs to embeddable format and ensure proper display on the public BNHS Hymn page
acceptanceCriteria: YouTube links in standard format (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VIDEO_ID) are properly converted to embeddable format
YouTube links in short format (https://youtu.be/VIDEO_ID) are properly converted to embeddable format
The video displays correctly on the public BNHS Hymn page after saving
The video auto-plays with sound after the configured 3-second delay
No changes are made to other existing functionality or pages

file_operations.description: Add YouTube URL conversion utility function that extracts video IDs from both standard (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VIDEO_ID) and short (https://youtu.be/VIDEO_ID) formats and converts them to embeddable format (https://www.youtube.com/embed/VIDEO_ID). Include URL validation to ensure proper YouTube domain matching.

Update the external link handling logic to use the YouTube URL converter utility when a YouTube URL is detected in the external link field. Apply the conversion before saving or previewing the video URL. Ensure the converted embeddable URL is stored and displayed in the preview correctly.

Update the BNHS Hymn video display section to properly render YouTube embeds using iframe with the embeddable URL format. Ensure the iframe includes autoplay and unmute parameters (autoplay=1&mute=0) and maintains the existing 3-second delay before auto-playing. Verify that the video URL is in embeddable format before rendering.

requirements.summary: Configure YouTube embed player with autoplay and sound enabled, and implement error handling for videos with privacy or embed restrictions
acceptanceCriteria: YouTube embed uses parameters that enable autoplay with sound (autoplay=1&mute=0)
Clear error message is displayed if a video cannot be embedded (privacy restrictions, embedding disabled)
The system gracefully handles edge cases like invalid YouTube URLs

file_operations.description: Add error handling for YouTube embed iframe failures. Implement onError event handler to detect when a video cannot be embedded due to privacy settings or embed restrictions. Display a user-friendly error message when embedding fails. Include validation for malformed or invalid YouTube URLs before attempting to render the iframe.

Add validation helper function that verifies YouTube URL format and returns null for invalid URLs. Include pattern matching for both standard and short YouTube URL formats with proper domain and path validation. This prevents attempting to embed non-YouTube or malformed URLs.

Add frontend validation for YouTube URLs before allowing save. Display validation error messages for invalid YouTube URL formats. Show a warning message if the URL might have embedding restrictions (though this cannot be fully validated client-side). Include helpful hints about YouTube URL formats in the UI.
